prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次约26903→27557→32434→33580→32804，整体呈后移趋势（位次数字增大），2021至2024年累计后移约6677名；2025年较2024年小幅前 移约776名，出现回调信号，近两年位次在32800-33600区间波动；该校在重庆物理类招生计划：2021年37人、2022年37人、2023年35人、2024年40人、2025年40 人；2026年计划40人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学是国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年约第1 73-198位，属于中后段211院校，学校层次对考生有一定吸引力但非顶尖；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显正面或负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第106（评价一般 ），短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度一般；无投档断档记录，报考心理预期稳定；青海大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在高原 医学、生态学、草学等特色领域，与招生专业中的临床医学、草业科学、动物医学等有一定关联，但学科评估等级对报考热度提升有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业以 工科、医学、农林为主：电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、临床医学（推荐）、自动化/电子信息类（高热推荐）等专业社会热度偏热；土木建筑（分化观 望）、生化环材（一般观望）热度偏低。重庆市2026年普通高考总人数约209000人，较2025年（约212851人）略有减少；物理类考生按近年占比约65%估算约13.6万人，较2025年1 3.9万人小幅下降，竞争略有缓和；青海大学位于青海省西宁市，距重庆较远，属于跨省报考；该校在重庆物理类招生计划约40 人，占该校全国招生总人数比例较小，地域偏好因素对报考热度有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2021-2024年持续后移、2025年小幅回调、2026年招生计划持平 、重庆市考生总数略有减少（竞争略缓和）、学校声誉平稳、地域吸引力一般等因素，预计2026年竞争略有缓和，位次在2025年基准32804名基础上小幅前移。预测最低位次约326 04名，区间32104-33104名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间32104-33104名内，建议以二档专业为主力选择、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（<32104）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技 术等热门专业；位次在区间中段（约32604附近）以临床医学、麻醉学、机械设计制造及其自动化等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限（>33104）建议优先考虑护理学、草业科学 、园艺等三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 26903 → 27557 → 32434 → 33580 → 32804, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of about 6677 places from 2021 to 2024; in 2025, there was a slight forward shift of about 776 places compared to 2024, indicating a correction signal, with rankings fluctuating in the 32800-33600 range in recent years; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category: 37 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 40 in 2024, 40 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 40, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, with a recent Soft Science China University ranking around 173-198, placing it in the mid-to-late segment of 211 institutions; the university's level has some appeal to candidates but is not top-tier; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents; its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 106 (average evaluation), with low short video exposure and average application attention; there are no records of enrollment gaps, and the application psychological expectation is stable; Qinghai University has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with advantageous disciplines mainly in plateau medicine, ecology, and grass science, which are somewhat related to enrollment majors such as clinical medicine, grass science, and animal medicine, but the discipline evaluation level has limited impact on boosting application popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors are mainly engineering, medicine, and agriculture/forestry: Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Class (recommended), Clinical Medicine (recommended), Automation/Electronic Information Class (highly recommended) and other majors have high social popularity; Civil Engineering and Architecture (differentiated observation), Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials (general observation) have low popularity. The total number of candidates for the Chongqing 2026 general college entrance examination is approximately 209,000, slightly decreasing from 2025 (about 212,851); Physics Category candidates, estimated at about 65% of the total in recent years, are about 136,000, a slight decrease from 139,000 in 2025, with slightly eased competition; Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, far from Chongqing, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing is about 40, accounting for a small proportion of the university's total national enrollment, and regional preference factors have a certain inhibitory effect on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward shift of historical rankings from 2021 to 2024, a slight correction in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Chongqing (slightly eased competition), stable university reputation, and average regional appeal, it is expected that competition in 2026 will slightly ease, with rankings moving slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 32804. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32604, with a range of 32104-33104.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 32104-33104, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<32104), focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science and Technology; for rankings in the middle of the range (around 32604), mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, and Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (>33104), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Nursing, Grass Science, and Horticulture to ensure admission.
